---
title: "Lectures"
---

Each lecture pairs a self-study notebook with a slide deck. All computation is imported from the
course library [`libdpy`](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/pub_lib). Order follows the current
offering [syllabus](syllabus.qmd).

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->
## K-anonymity

_Week 1_

_Short introduction coming soon._


## Reconstruction Attacks

_Week 2_

_Short introduction coming soon._

- **Blog post** — [Blog post](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb)
- **Presentation** — [Presentation](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.html)

## DP as Hypothesis Testing

_Week 3_

_Short introduction coming soon._

- **Blog post** — [Blog post](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb)
- **Presentation** — [Presentation](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.html)

## Privacy Auditing

_Week 4_

_Short introduction coming soon._

- **Blog post** — [Blog post](../content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb)
- **Presentation** — [Presentation](../content/lecture-presentations/privacy-auditing/presentation.html)

## Private Estimation

_Short introduction coming soon._

- **Presentation** — [Presentation](../content/lecture-presentations/private-estimation/presentation.html)

## Private Search

_Short introduction coming soon._

- **Presentation** — [Presentation](../content/lecture-presentations/private-search/presentation.html)
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->
